tasks.title: Implement project creation and management feature
tasks.description:
Create a complete project management feature allowing users to create and publish portfolio projects.

**Context:**
- Review existing ProfileContext pattern in src/context/ProfileContext.jsx
- Review existing Profile page pattern in src/pages/Profile.jsx
- Follow component structure patterns (ProfilePhoto, SocialLinks, SkillsInput)

**Files to create:**

1. **ProjectsContext** (src/context/ProjectsContext.jsx):
   - State management for projects array
   - Functions: addProject, updateProject, deleteProject, publishProject, saveDraft
   - Project schema: {id, title, description, completionDate, category, customTags[], projectType, collaborators[{name, role}], status: 'draft'|'published', createdAt, updatedAt}
   - Provide context to components
   - Write tests: src/context/ProjectsContext.test.jsx

2. **ProjectForm** (src/components/ProjectForm/):
   - Create ProjectForm.jsx, ProjectForm.css, ProjectForm.test.jsx
   - Fields: title (required), description (textarea with 2000 char limit + counter), completion date (date input), category (select: Web Development, Mobile App, Design, Data Science, Other), custom tags (chip input), project type (radio: Personal, Client Work, Collaborative), collaborators (dynamic list with name/role inputs)
   - Two buttons: "Save as Draft" and "Publish"
   - Validation: Draft requires only title (min 3 chars). Publish requires title, description (min 50 chars, max 2000), category, projectType
   - Show inline validation errors
   - Support create and edit modes via props

3. **ProjectCard** (src/components/ProjectCard/):
   - Create ProjectCard.jsx, ProjectCard.css, ProjectCard.test.jsx
   - Display: title, truncated description (150 chars), category badge, tags chips, project type, status badge (draft/published)
   - Actions: Edit button, Delete button
   - Responsive card layout

4. **ProjectsManager Page** (src/pages/ProjectsManager.jsx, ProjectsManager.css, ProjectsManager.test.jsx):
   - Display all user's projects using ProjectCard components
   - Filter tabs: All, Drafts, Published
   - "+ Create New Project" button opens ProjectForm
   - Edit: Click card's edit button to open ProjectForm with project data
   - Delete: Show confirmation dialog before deletion
   - Empty states for each filter

5. **Update App.jsx**:
   - Import and wrap app with ProjectsContext.Provider (after ProfileContext)
   - Add route: /projects-manager → ProjectsManager component

6. **Update Navbar.jsx**:
   - Add "Manage Projects" link to /projects-manager in navigation

**Validation Rules:**
- Title: required, 3-100 chars
- Description: 0-2000 chars
- Completion date: optional, cannot be future date
- Category: required for publish
- Project type: required for publish
- Draft: requires only title
- Publish: requires title, description (min 50 chars), category, projectType

**Write comprehensive tests:**
- Test all components with @testing-library/react and vitest
- Test validation rules (draft vs publish requirements)
- Test character counter for description
- Test collaborator add/remove
- Test tag input functionality
- Test filter tabs in ProjectsManager
- Test edit and delete workflows
- Mock ProjectsContext in tests
- Test routing integration

**Style Guidelines:**
- Follow existing CSS patterns from Profile.css and other components
- Use existing color scheme and spacing
- Ensure mobile responsiveness
- Match existing button and form input styles
acceptance_criteria: User can create new project with title, description (up to 2000 characters), and completion date
User can categorize projects using predefined categories (Web Development, Mobile App, Design, Data Science, Other) and custom tags
User can specify project type (personal, client work, collaborative)
User can add collaborators with role attribution
User can save projects as draft or publish immediately
System validates required fields before allowing publication
Filter tabs work correctly (All, Drafts, Published)
Edit and delete operations work as expected
All tests pass with good coverage

tasks.title: Validate project management feature tests
tasks.description:
Run the complete test suite for the new project management feature to ensure all functionality works correctly.

**Test files to validate:**
- src/context/ProjectsContext.test.jsx
- src/components/ProjectForm/ProjectForm.test.jsx
- src/components/ProjectCard/ProjectCard.test.jsx
- src/pages/ProjectsManager.test.jsx

**Run command:**
npm test -- --run

Ensure:
- All project-related tests pass
- No regressions in existing tests
- Validation logic works (draft vs publish)
- CRUD operations function correctly
acceptance_criteria: All new project management tests pass

tasks.title: Commit project management feature implementation
tasks.description:
Create a git commit for the complete project management feature.

**Files to commit:**
- src/context/ProjectsContext.jsx and tests
- src/components/ProjectForm/ (component, styles, tests)
- src/components/ProjectCard/ (component, styles, tests)
- src/pages/ProjectsManager.jsx, ProjectsManager.css, ProjectsManager.test.jsx
- Modified src/App.jsx (context provider and routing)
- Modified src/components/Navbar.jsx (new navigation link)

**Commit message format:**
feat: Implement project creation and management feature

- Add ProjectsContext for state management
- Create ProjectForm with validation (draft vs publish)
- Implement ProjectCard component for project display
- Add ProjectsManager page with filtering (All, Drafts, Published)
- Support full CRUD operations on projects
- Validate required fields before publication
- Add character counter for 2000-char description limit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
acceptance_criteria: All new and modified files are staged and committed
Commit message follows conventional commit format
Working tree is clean after commit
